category: Using The Vendor Neutral Contingency And Ras Auxiliary File
description: Use this API to write a Contingency Definition and Remedial Actions auxiliary file from memory. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.6.0. ierr = write_ras(ifile,options)

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Contingency definition and remedial actions auxiliary file. (input; no default allowed).

options.description: write records with bad ID fields (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘includebadid’.
do not write records with bad ID fields.
write records with bad ID fields.
write internal contents of fields with bad data (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘includebaddata’.
do not write fields with bad data.
write all fields with data input, even if values are invalid.
write all defined fields (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘includeallfields’.
write fields only if at least on record had data for that field.
write all fields, including fields defined for RAS analysis for which no data was entered on any record.
(future use) write bus numbers or names (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘busoutput’.

error_codes.description: Contingency and Remedial Actions definitions not in memory.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
